top3.sql:
SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date, e.location, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE i.amount > 50;

SELECT DISTINCT e.event_name, e.event_date, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE i.amount > 50;

JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id

JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE i.amount > 50;

final.sql:
SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date, e.location, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE i.amount > 50;
